headline: 50+ farms. 2,000+ customers. Now opening to investors.
subhead: FarmThru is raising through equity crowdfunding on Birchal. Here's what the numbers look like.
hero_copy:
FarmThru is a farm-direct grocery store with a hub-and-collect model. We connect regenerative farms across NSW directly to families, cutting out unnecessary middlemen. The food is fresher. The farmers earn more. And 2,000+ families already order every week.

In July 2026, we're opening an equity crowdfunding campaign on Birchal. For the first time, everyday investors can own a piece of FarmThru.

sections.heading: The traction
sections.body:
50+ partner farms across NSW, from Rachel's Farm in Kempsey to Bundarra Berkshires and Collins Wild Caught on the South Coast. 2,000+ active customers. Brookvale hub operating Monday-Friday, with growth plans for additional hubs.

This isn't a concept. It's a working grocery store with real customers, real farms, and real revenue.

sections.heading: The market
sections.body:
The Australian grocery market is worth $130B. Farm-direct food is the fastest-growing segment, up 24% year-on-year. Families increasingly want to know where their food comes from, how it was raised, and who grew it.

FarmThru sits at the intersection of these trends: regenerative agriculture, direct supply chains, and transparency. The hub-and-collect model keeps costs low while delivering food that's 2-3 days old, not 14-21 days in cold storage.

sections.heading: The terms
sections.body:
Equity crowdfunding on Birchal. Minimum investment: $50. Maximum cap: $10,000 per investor.

Investing in early-stage businesses carries risk. You could lose some or all of your investment. All details, financials, and risks will be disclosed in the offer document on Birchal. Consider seeking independent financial advice before making any investment decision.

sections.heading: Compliance
sections.body: This is a pre-registration page for an upcoming equity crowdfunding campaign. No money is being raised at this stage. Any future offer will be made via a disclosure document on Birchal. This is not financial advice. Consider seeking independent financial advice before making any investment decision.

creative_brief: Hero: clean data-led design with key metrics displayed prominently (50+ farms, 2,000+ customers, $130B market). Below-fold: market opportunity chart, farm partner map of NSW, team photos, Birchal badge. Professional but warm. Traction speaks louder than promises.
